title.en: The Tidal Breath of the Emerald Reef

description.ko: 진주빛 공간 속에서 생명력과 황금빛으로 맥동하는 심해 유기체 엔티티.
description.en: A deep-sea organic entity pulsing with life and golden light within a pearlescent void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Tidal Breath of the Emerald Reef.' A massive, translucent respiratory organism composed of #7FB069 emerald moss filaments and #2D5A3D vascular membranes, floating in a dense #E6F2E1 pearlescent underwater atmosphere. The entity rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap that flows like liquid silk through the currents. Macro focus on the microscopic breathing pores and pulsating internal sap channels. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh.
